title: The French Defense
summary: A solid pawn chain with counterattacking potential

steps.title: A Different Philosophy
steps.text: The French (1...e6) concedes center space but builds a granite pawn chain. Black plans ...d5, ...c5, and ...Nc6 to undermine White's center.

steps.title: The Blocked Center
steps.text: After 2...d5, White must decide: Advance (e5, gain space but block the center), Exchange (exd5, simplify), or Classical (Nc3, tactical). The French teaches you to play with AND against pawn chains.
